channel.title: Autism on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Autism on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Autism treated by an activator of the Vitamin D Receptor: supforaphane
item.description:
• New Study Shows Promise for Natural Support of Autism Symptoms - March 2024
      • VitaminDWiki - Activators of the Vitamin D Receptor include sulforaphane and curcumin – June 2020
      • VitaminDWiki - The risk of 50+ diseases at least double with poor Vitamin D Receptor

New Study Shows Promise for Natural Support of Autism Symptoms - March 2024

GreenMedInfo

  • “A new double-blind, placebo-controlled study published in Psychiatry and Clinical Neurosciences shows exciting potential for sulforaphane, a compound found in broccoli sprouts, to help ease symptoms of irritability and hyperactivity in children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD).”

item.title: Autism risky if low vitamin D during pregnancy and early life (mice, fecal transplant reversed it)
item.description:
• Induction of autism-related behavior in male mice by early-life vitamin D deficiency: association with disruption of the gut microbial composition and homeostasis
      • Other Indications that poor gut bacteria ==> increased risk of Autism
  • <a href="/posts/autism-risk-increased-if-infant-had-antibiotics-2x-acetaminophen-3x-or-no-vitami-pical-vitamin-d" style=“color: red; text-decoration: underline;” title=“This post/category does not exist yet: Autism risk increased if infant had antibiotics (2X), acetaminophen (3X), or no vitamin D drops (1.5X) – June 2018)) ((Autism associated with low gut flora (due to antibiotics) – Mercola Oct 2014)) ((Antibiotics and Vitamin D are associated with many of the same diseases))

Induction of autism-related behavior in male mice by early-life vitamin D deficiency: association with disruption of the gut microbial composition and homeostasis

Food Funct . 2024 Mar 27. doi: 10.1039/d4fo00279b PDF behind paywall

item.title: 24% lower risk of Autism for every 4 ng higher level of vitamin D during pregnancy
item.description:
• High-dose vitamin D3 supplementation in pregnancy and risk of neurodevelopmental disorders in the children at age 10: A randomized clinical trial
      • A previous successful trial used more Vitamin D for a longer time during pregnancy

High-dose vitamin D3 supplementation in pregnancy and risk of neurodevelopmental disorders in the children at age 10: A randomized clinical trial

The American Journal of Clinical Nutrition Vol 119, Issue 2, February 2024, Pages 362-370 https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ajcnut.2023.12.002

item.title: Autism risk if toxins, heavy metals, microplastics, etc during pregnancy (unless add Vitamin D)
item.description:
• The Autism Spectrum Disorder and Its Possible Origins in Pregnancy
      • VitaminDWiki – Microplastics now causing problems in most life forms - many studies

The Autism Spectrum Disorder and Its Possible Origins in Pregnancy

Int. J. Environ. Res. Public Health 2024, 21(3), 244; https://doi.org/10.3390/ijerph21030244

Rayane M. Botelho ORCID,Ana Lúcia M. Silva ORCID and Alexandre U. Borbely *ORCID

item.title: Autism reduced 24% for each 4 ng more Vitamin D while pregnant ( ADHD 12%)
item.description:
• High-dose vitamin D3 supplementation in pregnancy and risk of neurodevelopmental disorders in the children at age 10: A randomized clinical trial
      • VitaminDWiki - ADHD and Vitamin D Deficiency

High-dose vitamin D3 supplementation in pregnancy and risk of neurodevelopmental disorders in the children at age 10: A randomized clinical trial

Am J Clin Nutr . 2024 Feb;119(2):362-370. doi: 10.1016/j.ajcnut.2023.12.002

Kristina Aagaard 1, Jens Richardt Møllegaard Jepsen 2, Astrid Sevelsted 1, David Horner 1, Rebecca Vinding 1, Julie Bøjstrup Rosenberg 3, Nicklas Brustad 1, Anders Eliasen 4, Parisa Mohammadzadeh 3, Nilofar Følsgaard 1, María Hernández-Lorca 1, Birgitte Fagerlund 5, Birte Y Glenthøj 6, Morten Arendt Rasmussen 7, Niels Bilenberg 8, Jakob Stokholm 7, Klaus Bønnelykke 9, Bjørn H Ebdrup 6, Bo Chawes 10

item.title: Fewer neurons in males born from COVID-19 vaccinated mothers (rats)
item.description:
Will COVID-19 Shots Drive an Epidemic of Autism?

Brindle substack

  • “Male rats were the ones in which biochemical changes translated into an obvious manifestation of autism-like behaviours. Note that this was “pronounced”. Interestingly, this correlates with the human condition, in which boys are diagnosed with autism more often than girls. Of particular concern is the loss of neurons in the brain. Depending on the location of the brain, there were 24-38% fewer neurons in males born from dams (mothers) that had received the COVID-19 shot.”

item.title: Down syndrome people have even lower D levels if have additional Vitamin D diseases
item.description:
• Hypovitaminosis D in persons with Down syndrome and autism spectrum disorder
      • VitaminDWiki - Down syndrome and low vitamin D - several studies

Hypovitaminosis D in persons with Down syndrome and autism spectrum disorder

J Neurodev Disord . 2023 Oct 25;15(1):35. doi: 10.1186/s11689-023-09503-y.

Natalie K Boyd 1, Julia Nguyen 2, Mellad M Khoshnood 1, Timothy Jiang 1, Lina Nguyen 1, Lorena Mendez 1, Noemi A Spinazzi 3, Melanie A Manning 4, Michael S Rafii 5 6, Jonathan D Santoro 7 8

item.title: Aspartame while pregnant increased risk by 3.4 X that male infant will be Autistic
item.description:
• Daily Early-Life Exposures to Diet Soda and Aspartame Are Associated with Autism in Males: A Case-Control Study
      • Popular Artificial Sweetener Linked to Autism - Oct 2023
      • See also: Overview Alcohol and Vitamin D
      • See also: Off topic – Proven again – artificial sweeteners actually make you GAIN weight – Oct 2012

Daily Early-Life Exposures to Diet Soda and Aspartame Are Associated with Autism in Males: A Case-Control Study

Nutrients 2023, 15(17), 3772; https://doi.org/10.3390/nu15173772

item.title: Infants getting an additional 800 IU of vitamin D for 2 years had 60% fewer psychiatric symptoms at age 7 – RCT
item.description:
~~#00F:

Reduced: Autism, ADHD, Depression. etc

Notes:

    1. Finland was supplementing milk with Vitamin D during the study, so both groups got more D
    1. Study might have found better benefit if it had increased vitamin D dose with increased body weight
    • Infant body weight triples in 24 months - so probably need 3600 IU at 24 months
    1. Study might have found better benefit if it had adjusted vitamin D dose with BMI
    • Obese needs >2X more vitamin D
    1. Study might have found better benefits if supplementation had started before birth
    1. Study might have found better benefits with non-daily supplementation
    1. Study found a 79% reduction in problems if 1200 IU when mothers had Vitamin D levels <30 ng
    1. Preemies need even more vitamin D – no comment in study about preemies~~
      • Effect of Vitamin D3 Supplementation in the First 2 Years of Life on Psychiatric Symptoms at Ages 6 to 8 Years: A Randomized Clinical Trial
      • Study was reviewed at TrialSiteNews

Effect of Vitamin D3 Supplementation in the First 2 Years of Life on Psychiatric Symptoms at Ages 6 to 8 Years: A Randomized Clinical Trial

JAMA Netw Open. 2023 May 1;6(5):e2314319. doi: 10.1001/jamanetworkopen.2023.14319.

item.title: Transgender associated with autism, low vitamin D, low BMD, etc. - many studies
item.description:
Vitamin D levels have been crashing

  1. There has been a big increase in Autism

  2. Vitamin D has been proven to both prevent and treat Autism

  3. There has been a big increase in Transgender etc. individuals

  4. Perhaps low vitamin D before and/or after birth increases gender confusion

  5. People preparing for transgender therapy had lower Vitamin D levels

  6. Speculation: Increased vitamin D levels sometime after conception will decrease gender confusion
